languages.text: "Хищное древо?! Подобных чудовищ я еще не истреблял! Надо отыскать его и принести его прочную плоть на Фенрис — пусть выстругают из нее древко для достойного оружия!"

traits.locale_text: ДРАФТ "Разве схватка с чудовищем не горячит твою кровь, эттфатер? На Фенрисе на пиру, упившись мьода, каждый из Волков может поведать немало саг о том, как повергал тварей втрое больше себя!"
"Хищное древо?! Подобных чудовищ я еще не истреблял! Надо отыскать его и принести его прочную плоть на Фенрис — пусть выстругают из нее древко для достойного оружия!"
traits.speaker: UlfarCompanion

languages.text: "A predatory tree? I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"
languages.original_text: "Хищное древо?! Подобных чудовищ я еще не истреблял! Надо отыскать его и принести его прочную плоть на Фенрис — пусть выстругают из нее древко для достойного оружия!"

traits.locale_text: "A predatory tree?! I have yet to exterminate such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenrys. Let them carve a worthy weapon's haft from it!"
"A predatory tree?! I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"

DRAFT "Fighting a beast makes your blood run hot, does it not, Aett-Vater? At feasts on Fenris, gorged with mjod, each of the Wolves can tell many sagas of how he has defeated creatures three times his own size!"
"A predatory tree?! I have yet to exterminate such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenrys. Let them carve a worthy weapon's haft from it!"
"A predatory tree?! I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"
"A predatory tree? I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"

languages.text: «¡¿Un árbol depredador?! ¡Todavía no he abatido una monstruosidad así! Debemos darle caza y llevar su madera a Fenris. ¡Con ella tallaremos el asta de un arma grandiosa!».
languages.original_text: "A predatory tree?! I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"

traits.locale_text: «¡¿Un árbol depredador?! ¡Todavía no he abatido una monstruosidad así! Debemos darle caza y llevar su madera a Fenris. ¡Con ella tallaremos el asta de un arma grandiosa!».

languages.text: “一棵攻击人的树？！我还从未斩杀过这种怪物！我们必须找到它，将那坚韧的木材带回芬里斯，并用它来制作一柄不错的武器握柄！”
languages.original_text: "A predatory tree?! I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"

traits.locale_text: “一棵攻击人的树？！我还从未斩杀过这种怪物！我们必须找到它，将那坚韧的木材带回芬里斯，并用它来制作一柄不错的武器握柄！”

languages.text: « Un arbre prédateur ?! Je n'ai encore jamais abattu une telle monstruosité ! Trouvons-le et rapportons son bois robuste sur Fenris. Nous en ferons la poignée d'une arme de valeur ! »
languages.original_text: "A predatory tree?! I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"

traits.locale_text: « Un arbre prédateur ?! Je n'ai encore jamais abattu une telle monstruosité ! Trouvons-le et rapportons son bois robuste sur Fenris. Nous en ferons la poignée d'une arme de valeur ! »

languages.text: "Yırtıcı bir ağaç mı? Henüz böyle bir yaratığı katletmedim! Onu bulmalı ve dayanıklı kerestesini Fenris'e geri götürmeliyiz. Onu layık bir silahın sapına yontalım!"
languages.original_text: "A predatory tree?! I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"

traits.locale_text: "Yırtıcı bir ağaç mı? Henüz böyle bir yaratığı katletmedim! Onu bulmalı ve dayanıklı kerestesini Fenris'e geri götürmeliyiz. Onu layık bir silahın sapına yontalım!"

languages.text: "Ein räuberischer Baum? Eine solche Monstrosität habe ich noch nie getötet! Wir müssen sie finden und ihr Holz nach Fenris bringen. Lasst uns das Heft einer würdigen Waffe daraus schnitzen!"
languages.original_text: "A predatory tree?! I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"

traits.locale_text: "Ein räuberischer Baum? Eine solche Monstrosität habe ich noch nie getötet! Wir müssen sie finden und ihr Holz nach Fenris bringen. Lasst uns das Heft einer würdigen Waffe daraus schnitzen!"

languages.text: 「捕食樹？そのような怪物はまだ倒したことがない！見つけ出して、その丈夫な材木をフェンリスに持ち帰ろう。立派な武器の柄に彫り上げよう！"
languages.original_text: "A predatory tree?! I have yet to slay such a monstrosity! We must find it and carry its durable timber back to Fenris. Let us carve it into the haft of a worthy weapon!"

traits.locale_text: 「捕食樹？そのような怪物はまだ倒したことがない！見つけ出して、その丈夫な材木をフェンリスに持ち帰ろう。立派な武器の柄に彫り上げよう！"
